name_it: Saint Fidelis of Sigmaringen, priest and martyr
name_en: Saint Fidelis of Sigmaringen, priest and martyr
name_es: Saint Fidelis of Sigmaringen, priest and martyr
name_pt: Saint Fidelis of Sigmaringen, priest and martyr
bio_en: Fidelis of Sigmaringen, OFM Cap. was a German Capuchin friar who was involved in the Catholic Counter-Reformation. He was martyred by his opponents at Seewis im Prättigau, now part of Switzerland. Fidelis was canonized in 1746.
bio_it: Fidelis of Sigmaringen, OFM Cap. was a German Capuchin friar who was involved in the Catholic Counter-Reformation. He was martyred by his opponents at Seewis im Prättigau, now part of Switzerland. Fidelis was canonized in 1746.
